subject: Schedule dividend-growth via shared rule + audit EventBridge rule saturation

rule_audit.note: EventBridge default cap is 300 rules per event bus. The account is saturated - new per-Lambda rules now fail. Strategic fix: migrate scheduled invocations to EventBridge Scheduler (no 300 cap) or consolidate onto shared multi-target rules.

wire: added justhodl-dividend-growth as target #2 on capital-return-daily
verdict: DIVIDEND-GROWTH SCHEDULED - co-hosted on capital-return-daily (cron(45 13 * * ? *)), auto-refreshes daily. Account is at 300/300 EventBridge rules; recommend migrating scheduled invocations to EventBridge Scheduler to remove the cap.
